text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Taiki. Perfect timing—I was just looking for
someone to partner with.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That sounds wicked to the max! And how about
we go grab some eats at a fusion restaurant when
we're done?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hey now, baby! What's with that funky look?
C'mon, let's book it to the track already!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You don't seem like your usual self, Taiki... Is
everything okay?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's sharp! Suzuka, you're so perceptive! You've
totally caught on!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I've actually been conducting some secret lessons
with Taiki recently, and now she's super fly! Her
speed's totally tubular compared to before!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Huh... Well, speed aside, it looks like you've
rubbed off on her in some other ways as well.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it does sound like she's picked up some hip
lingo during our lessons. Anyhoo, that darlin's
vocab is in apple-pie order now, bub.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Wait... Did she rub off on you too, Maruzen?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
My speed and style are both radically bodacious
right now! C'mon, Suzuka—let's hit the track!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Course, thanks to those lessons, my own racin' is
fine as gravy too! Boy howdy, is that a three-way
duel I smell?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Let's just start running already. I feel like my
head's spinning here...
